title: Clarify your meaning
subtitle: Repair communication naturally.
overview: Use clarification phrases before repeating yourself.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: Let me explain it another way.

items.es: Lo que quiero decir es que necesito más tiempo.
items.en: What I mean is that I need more time.

items.es: Me refiero al problema con la reserva, no al precio.
items.en: I am referring to the problem with the reservation, not the price.

items.es: No quería decir que la idea fuera mala.
items.en: I did not mean that the idea was bad.
Let me explain it another way.

items.es: Mi punto es que necesitamos una solución más simple.
items.en: My point is that we need a simpler solution.
